problem_statement: The platform needs a canonical wholistic symbolic loop contract that governs platform episodes without granting runtime authority or weakening deterministic subsystem contracts.
success_criteria: the loop contract validates against a repository-local JSON schema
the contract separates epistemic, effect-bearing, and hybrid actions before execution
effect-bearing actions require UAO, Phi_gov authority, life-meaning judgment, rollback or recovery evidence, rejected-delta logging, and post-verification learning admission
deterministic kernel boundaries are explicit so DMRS, validators, parsers, and route helpers are not polluted by recursive orchestration
read-only holistic loop registry admission is allowed and must not grant runtime registration
the contract denies runtime registration, execution authority, connector authority, deployment claims, and terminal closure until later evidence exists
missing or malformed UAO, causal trace, receipt, evidence, or guard fields fail closed with explicit validator errors
non_goals: no public deployment or production readiness claim
no replacement of Universal Action Orchestration, DMRS, validators, parsers, or deterministic route helpers
constraints: Foundation Mode remains active and public readiness remains AwaitingEvidence
no raw private reasoning fields may appear in loop receipts or contract payloads
effect-bearing actions must carry uao_ref, causal_decision_trace_ref, and receipt_ref
learning updates are admitted only after verification
Mfidel atomicity remains a hard invariant for any future Amharic, Geez, Ethiopic, or Mfidel surface
evidence_required: governed symbolic loop contract schema validation receipt
focused pytest receipt for validator behavior
future security review receipt before runtime or adapter authority
proof-matrix receipt for default holistic loop registry admission
governed symbolic loop admission dossier with no runtime registration effect
workspace governance preflight receipt before closure claim
